differential_diagnoses: Heart failure with preserved ejection fraction (HFpEF)
Pulmonary pathology related to prior granulomatosis with polyangiitis
next_steps: Complete blood count (CBC) to evaluate for anemia
Transesophageal echocardiography or stress echocardiography for definitive aortic stenosis severity assessment
Fecal immunochemical test (FIT) or repeat colonoscopy
Cardiac catheterization for coronary anatomy evaluation
Referral to Heart Team for TAVR evaluation
